title: Baa, Baa, Black Sheep
content:
Baa, Baa, Black Sheep.

                    Baa, baa, Black Sheep,
                        Have you any wool?
                    Yes, marry, have I,
                        Three bags full:



                    One for my Master,
                        And one for my Dame,
                    And one for the little boy
                        That lives in the lane!
meaning:
Leonard Leslie Brooke's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Baa, Baa, Black Sheep"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
